name: GAIAM.COM
message: [AI generated] GAIAM.COM is an American based company that specializes in health and wellness products. The company's offerings fall under different categories including yoga, fitness, meditation, and eco-living. Their diverse portfolio includes yoga mats, fitness equipment, clothing, organic cotton clothing, bedding, and home goods. Gaiam aims to provide goods that are not only beneficial to the health and well-being of their customers, but also environment-friendly.
